debug_info.goal:
n d p : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero n
hn : n > 3
P : Fin n → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hP : ∀ (i j : Fin n), j ≠ i - 1 → j ≠ i → (EuclideanGeometry.oangle (P (i - 1)) (P i) (P j)).sign = 1
hp : ↑p = ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + 1))
hd : ↑d = 1 / 2 * ∑ i, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ \ {i - 1, i, i + 1}, dist (P i) (P j)
⊢ ↑n - 3 < 2 * ↑d / ↑p ∧ 2 * ↑d / ↑p < ↑⌊↑n / 2⌋ * ↑⌊(↑n + 1) / 2⌋ - 2

  have hS_upper_k : ∀ k, 1 ≤ k → S k < k * p := by

  -- Full upper bound using symmetry

        rw [Nat.card_Icc, Nat.add_sub_cancel, Nat.sub_sub, Nat.cast_sub h_n_ge_4]
        simp
      _ = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), p := by rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
      _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), S k := Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty
          (by use 2; rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor; linarith; linarith)
          (fun k hk => (h_bound k hk).1)
  · rw [div_lt_iff p_pos, mul_comm, hd_sum]
    calc ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), S k
      _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p := Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty
          (by use 2; rw [Finset.mem_Icc]; constructor; linarith; linarith)
          (fun k hk => (h_bound k hk).2)
      _ = (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ)) * p := by rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
      _ = (⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊(n + 1 : ℝ) / 2⌋ - 2) * p := by
          congr
          -- Arithmetic identity for the sum of min(k, n-k)
          sorry

  rw [h_decomp, div_lt_iff hp_pos, lt_div_iff hp_pos]

have hp_pos : 0 < (p : ℝ) := by
    rw [hp]

      have := hP i (i+1) (by intro h'; simp [sub_eq_iff_eq_add] at h'; rw [h'] at hn; have : 1 < n := by linarith; simp at h') (by intro h'; simp at h')

have hp_pos : 0 < (p : ℝ) := by
    rw [hp]
    refine Finset.sum_pos (fun i _ => dist_pos.mpr ?_) Finset.univ_nonempty
    intro h_eq
    have h_angle := hP (i-1) i (by simp) (by simp)
    rw [h_eq] at h_angle
    simp at h_angle

  constructor
  · rw [lt_div_iff hp_pos]
    -- Lower bound: 2d > (n-3)p

    have h_lower : ((n : ℝ) - 3) * p < 2 * d := sorry
    exact h_lower
  · rw [div_lt_iff hp_pos]
    -- Upper bound: 2d < K * p

    have h_upper : 2 * (d : ℝ) < p * K := sorry
    exact h_upper

  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [lt_div_iff hp_pos]
    -- We prove 2d > (n-3)p.

    -- We prove 2d < (floor(n/2) * floor((n+1)/2) - 2) * p.
    -- This is a known bound for the sum of diagonals in a convex polygon.

sorry

  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · -- Left inequality
    rw [lt_div_iff hp_pos, h_2d]
    have : (n - 3 : ℝ) * p = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), p := by

    rw [this]

    exact h_lower_k

    calc ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), S k
      _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p :=

      _ = (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ)) * p := Finset.sum_mul.symm
      _ = (⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊(n + 1 : ℝ) / 2⌋ - 2) * p := by rw [h_arith_sum]

sorry
  exact ⟨h_lower, h_upper⟩

have hp_pos : (p : ℝ) > 0 := by
    rw [hp]
    apply Finset.sum_pos (fun _ _ => dist_pos.2 (mt (congr_arg P) (by 
      intro h; have := hP 0 1 (by decide); sorry))) Finset.univ_nonempty

    calc ((n : ℝ) - 3) * p 
      _ = (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (1 : ℝ)) * p := by 
          simp; norm_cast; rw [Nat.sub_sub, Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]; rfl
      _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_mul]; apply Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty (by use 2; simp [hn]) h_k_gt_p

  · rw [h2d]
    have h_k_lt_bound : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k)) < (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p := by

    calc ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
      _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p := 
          Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty (by use 2; simp [hn]) h_k_lt_bound
      _ = (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ)) * p := by rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
      _ = (⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊(n + 1 : ℝ) / 2⌋ - 2) * p := by
          congr; sorry

let S : ℕ → ℝ := λ k => ∑ i, dist (P i) (P (i + k))
  have h_d_sum : 2 * (d : ℝ) = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), S k := sorry
  have h_p_pos : (p : ℝ) > 0 := sorry
  have h_lower : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), S k > p := sorry
  have h_upper : ∀ k ∈ Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), S k < min k (n - k) * p := sorry
  have h_sum_min : (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ)) = ⌊(n/2 : ℝ)⌋ * ⌊(n+1 : ℝ)/2⌋ - 2 := sorry
  constructor
  · rw [div_lt_iff₀' h_p_pos, h_d_sum]
    have h_card : (Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2)).card = n - 3 := sorry
    calc (n - 3 : ℝ) * p 
      _ = (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), 1 : ℝ) * p := by rw [h_card]; simp
      _ = ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), p := by simp
      _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), S k := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ k hk => h_lower k hk) 
          (by use 2; simp; exact hn)
  · rw [lt_div_iff₀' h_p_pos, h_d_sum]
    calc ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), S k
      _ < ∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ) * p := Finset.sum_lt_sum (λ k hk => h_upper k hk) 
          (by use 2; simp; exact hn)
      _ = (∑ k in Finset.Icc 2 (n - 2), (min k (n - k) : ℝ)) * p := Finset.sum_mul.symm
      _ = (⌊(n/2 : ℝ)⌋ * ⌊(n+1 : ℝ)/2⌋ - 2) * p := by rw [h_sum_min]

have hp_pos : 0 < (p : ℝ) := by
    rw [hp]
    refine Finset.sum_pos (fun i _ => dist_pos.mpr (fun h => ?_)) Finset.univ_nonempty
    -- If vertices coincide, the convexity condition (sign = 1) fails

  have h_upper : (2 * d : ℝ) < (⌊(n : ℝ) / 2⌋ * ⌊((n : ℝ) + 1) / 2⌋ - 2) * p := by
    -- Upper bound: 2d < (floor(n/2)*floor((n+1)/2) - 2)p

    -- Summing these lengths weighted by edge usage gives the combinatorial coefficient.

  exact ⟨h_lower, h_upper⟩

    -- Property: sum of pairwise distances ≤ floor(n^2/4) * max_dist (for convex arrangement)

    rw [hp]

    intro h

    -- formed by vertices A_i, A_{i+1}, A_j, A_{j+1}.
